word: G3878 - παρακούω - parakoúō - par-ak-oo'-o - Neglect to hear

sections.paragraph:
- Original: παρακούω

- Transliteration: Parakouo

- Phonetic: par-ak-oo'-o

- Definition:

1. to hear aside

a. causally or carelessly or amiss

2. to be unwilling to hear

a. on hearing to neglect, to pay no heed to

b. to refuse to hear, pay no regard to, disobey

- Origin: from G3844 and G191

- TDNT entry: 04:43,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3844 and G191; to mishear that is (by implication) to disobey: - neglect to hear.
